description_long: This is a modern, single-family house with a flat roof and a spacious, open layout. The front yard features a driveway with two parked cars, a manicured lawn, and a wooden carport or shed to the side. The backyard includes a swimming pool, a trampoline, a patio with outdoor seating, and landscaped greenery, providing ample recreational space. Large windows and sliding glass doors are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, allowing for abundant natural light. The house is surrounded by trees, shrubs, and flower beds, enhancing its suburban appeal. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, functional outdoor areas, and a blend of natural and built elements.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large windows, a driveway, carport, pool, and landscaped gardens. The design features open outdoor spaces and a mix of recreational amenities.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, two cars, main entrance, carport, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport, side lawn, and partial view of the backyard amenities.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, patio, trampoline, and large glass doors opening to the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the carport, driveway, and additional greenery along the house perimeter.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, no porch, flanked by landscaped greenery and a paved path, minimal decorative elements
